subject: {{sender.contact_name}}'s job has now been paid out!

rows.text: We've processed payment on the job you completed for {{sender.contact_name}}. You should receive the payment from Ideal4Finance within a few hours.
What do I need to do?
rows.subtext: Nothing, just sit tight. Get in touch with us if you haven't received payment within 24 hours of this email. Reach out to us using the contact information below.
